title: mentha microphylla var. glareosa
intro: Mentha microphylla var. glareosa, also known as Chilean peppermint, is a variety of the mint plant that is native to South America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Chilean peppermint include its potential to alleviate nausea, headaches, and menstrual cramps, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Mentha microphylla var. glareosa can be made into teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments and promote overall well-being.
